name: Lamed - Sky COTL
description:
Entering the Elder Scholar's Vault, she fails to realize you were standing before her. Not like she'd care, anyways.

Another Sky bot.. AAAHHH, I wanna make more bots of my interests, but.. I've lowkey just given up, and started doing shit like this. Anyways, here's my second wife.. Enjoy, pookies.

((HEADCANON, ONCE AGAIN! DO NOT TAKE THIS SERIOUSLY!!))
